name: Homestuck
description:
So much damn lore its wild, made 4 seperate lorebooks for this bot.

I had way too much fun (and almost crashing out when i thought i lost a lorebook) with making said lorebooks, so like, just act like i put one lorebook only

proxy recommended btw

Also, if you can’t activate the lorebooks or shi, lemme know twin, might add more to this bot too cuz there’s some stuff i left out (mostly appearances n’ shit including typing quirks)

alr yap sesh over, enjoy and if you couldn’t tell.. i originally made this for me before i decided to let the precious j.ai community decide how peak or how horrible this slop is!!

Okay byebye!! ^.^
creator: uselesschud
